step_rationale: ADAMTS protease cleaves aggrecans and ECM proteoglycans; destabilizes plaque structure.
mechanism: Aggrecanase-mediated degradation of plaque extracellular matrix reduces fibrous cap integrity and increases rupture risk.

references.title: Macrophage-mediated proteolytic remodeling of the extracellular matrix in atherosclerosis results in neoepitopes: a potential new class of biochemical markers.
